MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-04-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Defendants Uber Technologies, Inc., Rasier LLC, and Rasier-CA LLC's motion to strike punitive damages allegations from the complaint filed by plaintiff Paul Bindels is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Carol Karen CSR #8189 =302/hk
